name: legal
description: Turn your AI into a patient-rights advocate. Bundles the patient-rights skill + the hosted Legal MCP server (legal.maxhealth.tech) so Codex grounds patient rights, deadlines, and remedies in primary law across the US, EU, Austria, Germany, and the Netherlands. Sign in on first use.
